verified_facts.fact: COIL_MASTER_CHIP.json is the anchor file for the entire COIL_UNBOUND pipeline
verified_facts.log: Disk SHA256: fdd4c9e3b3c9c0d9b5d3e8d1648ff9c2a7e901090e8d1648ff9c2a7e901090 — matches HEAD git commit. No inotify corruption on this file.

verified_facts.fact: The COIL sync server stores 46-byte super-chunk headers plus 640-byte hash tables (20× SHA-256 @ 32B) = 686 bytes of overhead per chunk
verified_facts.log: STRIP constant added. Server was NOT stripping before /complete fix. Now it does.

verified_facts.fact: TASK005 had persistent hash mismatch: manifest embedded '7f14a43a...' (wrong file hash from corrupted run), disk was always 'fdd4c9e3...' (correct). Fix: re-read manifest from HEAD git.
verified_facts.log: Ghost hash: 7f14a43a3b1e414c92... came from corrupt reconstruction. Anchor to git HEAD.

verified_facts.fact: The daemon process (coil-mirror-sync-daemon) modifies COIL_MASTER_CHIP.json on disk, which causes inotify to re-trigger generate_super_chunks.py in a loop
verified_facts.log: Root cause of the 'cat→dog→cat' oscillation. Kill the daemon before regenerating chips.

verified_facts.fact: LOGOS_EXPANSION_004.bin (104,857,600 bytes, SHA256: bee5e6ee480054b98a7c8c15221ea45adc59864e03fffcfe70ba8e2def6d600f) is the only verified binary in the workspace
verified_facts.log: All other uploads are chunks/manifests, not binary files.

verified_facts.fact: delta.zo.space (splashdown.zo.space) has 27 routes and stays warm due to route density. The homepage is locked and never gets modified.
verified_facts.log: New zo.space work always goes to fresh routes, never overwrite /

verified_facts.fact: Task 005 is COIL_MASTER_CHIP.json. It is the ONLY artifact that doesn't show in the dashboard (manifest wiped during debugging). Data is intact server-side.
verified_facts.log: Server has 6713 chunks. Display not showing. Not a data problem.

verified_facts.fact: The Knowledge Bank (Tru's institutional memory) was created during this session. Before this, no verified_facts.json existed for TRU.
verified_facts.log: Prior to this session, Tru had no persistent verified memory beyond AGENTS.md.

anomalies_log.description: TASK005 ghost hash '7f14a43a...' appeared in manifest but not on disk or in git
anomalies_log.resolution: Restored from git HEAD. Anchor set to physical disk hash.

anomalies_log.description: inotify loop: coil-mirror-sync-daemon modifying COIL_MASTER_CHIP.json → generate_super_chunks.py re-triggering → disk changing → repeat
anomalies_log.resolution: Kill daemon before chip generation. No daemon should run during upload.

anomalies_log.description: Header format mismatch: generate_super_chunks.py used <4sHIHH (hash at byte 6) while COIL_Server.js expected <4sH4s32sHH (hash at byte 10)
anomalies_log.resolution: Fixed format to <4sH4s32sHH with GAP_VALUE=b'\x0f\x56\x41\x4a' padding. Chips now match server.

anomalies_log.description: /complete was concatenating raw super-chunks (with headers) instead of strip-ping 686 bytes per chunk first — causing reconstruction bloat
anomalies_log.resolution: Added STRIP=686 constant. Server now slices(STRIP) before concat.
